Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Alfredo A. Contreras Individually, Dba Hall Of Faucets & Fixtures Should Not Be Held In Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Alfredo A. Contreras Should Not Be Held In Contempt is granted. Plaintiff shall make personal service of the Order To Show Cause no later than October 6, 2006 for a hearing date of November 7, 2006 at 10:30 a.m. in Room 612. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
